title: bellardia viscosa
intro: Bellardia viscosa, also known as sticky Bellardia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat digestive issues and infections. The leaves and roots of the plant contain compounds that have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Bellardia viscosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
